top_signals.title: Pentagon identifies American soliders killed in Iranian attack in Jordan
top_signals.summary: 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Shipbuilding Contract Awarded for Missile Range Instrumentation Vessels
top_signals.summary: Hanwha Philly Shipyard (HPSI) and TOTE Services were selected to deliver the Missile Defense Agency’s (MDA) Missile Range Instrumentation Vessels (MRIV). TOTE Services will serve as vessel construction manager (VCM), and HPSI will build the…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former chief lending officer of Heritage State Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Royal Mint Trading Fund: framework document
top_signals.summary: This document sets out the accountabilities and relationships between the Royal Mint Trading Fund, the Shareholder (HM Treasury) and the Shareholder Representative (UK Government Investments).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nara cafe owner hopeful about ancient capitals’ World Heritage listing
top_signals.summary: The UNESCO World Heritage Committee' is deliberating in Busan, South Korea, whether to add the Asuka-Fujiwara ancient capitals to its list of World Heritage sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026
top_signals.summary: Minutes of the Board's discount rate meeting on April 20 and 29, 2026

top_signals.title: Bitcoin price hits $65K wall as stocks battle ‘record’ institutional tech sell-off
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin faced troublesome resistance at $65,000 while traders still saw a potential BTC price breakout into a “bullish market structure.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
